description.initial: You've reached the far northern waters, where the ocean grows colder and the sky seems vast and empty. Seabirds are rare here, and the water takes on a steely grey color. This feels like the edge of the safe-to-sail world, a place where few sailors venture.
description.return: The far northern ocean. Cold, grey, and lonely.
description.atmospheric: The wind carries a chill that penetrates to your bones. The silence is profound.

north.blockedMessage: The sky city floats too high above to be reached from the water.

interactables.name: Albatross
interactables.examineText: A single albatross circles overhead, its enormous wingspan carrying it effortlessly on the wind. It seems to be watching you.
